detail.text: The story starts with the lettersA, B, and C being presented in asimple way. But, when it was timefor the letter D to present himself,he was interrupted by the letter Fwho kidnapped him along with theletter E, locking them both in hisplace. while the rest of the alphabetstarted looking for it. The letter Fkept fighting, kidnapping, and killingthe rest of the alphabet until only theletter N was left. There is a plot twistat the end. We all thought that letterFwas just evil, but it turned out whenthe letters were lowercase «Letters»N and F were friends, but F wasbullied by the other letters and wasexiled to be alone. Fs plan all alongwas to form the word friends for hisfriend N, who had forgotten abouttheir friendship. To do this, F waskidnapping the letters he needed. Nwill remember his friendship throughQ, who will give him the questionmark he needed to discover why Fwas doina all this.

Some letters have superpowersor magic gems given to themthrough punctuation marks. Thesuperpowers these gems give aresimilar to their roles in a sentence.Comma «,»: This gem slows downthe letter when it's shot exactlylike the role of a comma in thesentence. Letters are combinedwith the gem.Semicolon : It works like a stickor a glue, joining the metterstogether and combing themlike the role of a semicolon in aphrase.The letter with this gem freezesa letter when it's shot This is inreference to what a period doeswhen you put it at the end of aphrase.

The exclamation mark () makesthe letter energetic and fast likeit did with P. The same effectan exclamation mark has on asentence when put at the endof it These gems have a specialpower to rewind time to any periodin the past. Combining this gemwith a question mark enables thefuture to be brought to the pastself of gem wearer. This is whathappened in the «Now I Know MyABCs..., when future N was shownthe past and then it's past selfsaw the future and changed hisactions, so F did not end up eviland vengeful.The question mark«?» indicates the future and canalso indicate the past to the letterthat is using it. Multiplicationsymbol *: this gem multiplies theletter using it.

dhings happened So many interesting things happened in this story that show the creativity in the storyline, making the story interesting and fun and emotional to watch. -The Two Pot Twist: At first you think that F is just evil and bad and that the other letters are the good guys, but when you realize howF was treated and how he became vengeful towards the other letters, -That moment you realize F is actually trying to make the word «FRIENDS» when he was kidnapping the other letters. Even though he killed some letters, F was actually kidnapping the letters he needed to make the word to remind his old friend N of their friendship when they were lowercase. -Letters can combine to make words that translate into objects to help them through their questions like CAB and MAP. The epilogue that fixed the sad ending by showing the future to lowercase N, who changed his actions by not ignoring his friend F when he was bullied, taking the punch with him and staying friends. -Z being the world everyone lives in and a representation of sleeping.

items_data.title: Why is F the bad guy ?

detail.text: I think we have talked about this afew times, but why was F bullied bythe other letters? The story beginswhen the letters spell friendsand they are happy about it. So 0and I decided to pull a prank andseparate them N was injured andlaughed at by the letters o andwhen F came to him and theybecame friends, and decided toget revenge by making a fart wordbehind I, which made it look likehe farted. This is when 0 and Lpranked F into spelling Frick andthe other letters turned against himwith n to0. So he made a plan forrevenge, and when everyone forgot F
